Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a computer on the desk here.[n]I wonder if it belongs to someone...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I heard that anyone can use this computer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_TUTORIAL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Various computer software can be used on this computer to pass time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The resulting effect depends on the item you use.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}However, the computer cannot be used if someone else in the dorm is using it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like there are some[n]pre-installed programs.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...A package on the bookshelf has a[n]sticker on it that says, "Free to borrow."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I borrow something...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend my time[n]using the computer...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend my time[n]using the computer...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the computer I was told[n]can be used by anyone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But I don't have any computer[n]software on me right now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_UMIUSHI_WEB
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The fan book came with a membership code[n]that can be used on the official website...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let's take a look at Umiushi's website...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_REVENGE_SITE_WEB
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}As I recall, this site was shut down...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today's the Promised Day...[n]I should head to Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Someone else is using[n]the computer right now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_0531
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4136 0 0}Hm? You want to use the computer?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Good timing. I just finished my own business. Feel free to use it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm feeling lethargic... I should[n]probably go to bed early...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_0429
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4136 0 0}Hm? What is it, {f 4 1}? Is there something you're trying to look up?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}That computer is for shared use. The Internet is back up, so feel free to use it whenever you want.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I can vouch for its performance and capacity. You may also install additional software on it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}...However, keep in mind that it's shared property.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}You should probably avoid installing the game that Iori gave you yesterday onto it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I don't know the details, but I heard that it keeps a record of your private conversations.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Right now, the Temperance Arcana[n]may help me grow even more...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}[n]may not get any higher...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I still spend my time[n]using the computer...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}[n]may not get any higher...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I still spend my time[n]using the computer...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}[n]may not get any higher...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I still spend my time[n]using the computer...?[n]{f 1 1}
